creator: darius@dons.net.au
text:
Hi,
I tried to install archivers/rpm4 on a -current machine but it fails to build with..
libtool: install: /usr/bin/install -c .libs/_rpm.lai /tmp/work/usr/ports/archivers/rpm4/work/stage/usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/rpm/_rpm.la
libtool: warning: relinking '_rpmb.la'
libtool: install: (cd /tmp/work/usr/ports/archivers/rpm4/work/rpm-4.13.0.2/python; /bin/sh "/tmp/work/usr/ports/archivers/rpm4/work/rpm-4.13.0.2/libtool"  --tag CC --mode=relink cc -O2 -pipe -fstack-protector -isystem /usr/local/include -fno-strict-aliasing -fPIC -DPIC -D_REENTRANT -Wall -Wpointer-arith -Wmissing-prototypes -Wstrict-prototypes -fno-strict-aliasing -fstack-protector -Wempty-body -module -avoid-version -shared -L/usr/local/lib -L/usr/local/lib/nss -L/usr/local/lib/db5 -L/usr/local/lib -fstack-protector -o _rpmb.la -rpath /usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/rpm rpmbmodule.lo spec-py.lo ../build/librpmbuild.la ../lib/librpm.la ../rpmio/librpmio.la -lpython2.7 -lpthread -lintl -L/usr/local/lib -inst-prefix-dir /tmp/work/usr/ports/archivers/rpm4/work/stage)
libtool: relink: cc -shared  -fPIC -DPIC  .libs/rpmbmodule.o .libs/spec-py.o   -Wl,-rpath -Wl,/usr/local/lib -L/usr/local/lib -L/usr/local/lib/nss -L/usr/local/lib/db5 ../build/.libs/librpmbuild.so /tmp/work/usr/ports/archivers/rpm4/work/rpm-4.13.0.2/lib/.libs/librpm.so -liconv -lmagic ../lib/.libs/librpm.so /tmp/work/usr/ports/archivers/rpm4/work/rpm-4.13.0.2/rpmio/.libs/librpmio.so -ldb ../rpmio/.libs/librpmio.so -lnss3 -lbz2 -lz -lpopt -llzma -llua-5.1 -lm -lpython2.7 -lpthread -lintl  -O2 -fstack-protector -fstack-protector -fstack-protector   -Wl,-soname -Wl,_rpmb.so -o .libs/_rpmb.so
libtool: install: /usr/bin/install -c .libs/_rpmb.soT /tmp/work/usr/ports/archivers/rpm4/work/stage/usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/rpm/_rpmb.so
libtool: install: strip --strip-unneeded /tmp/work/usr/ports/archivers/rpm4/work/stage/usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/rpm/_rpmb.so
libtool: install: /usr/bin/install -c .libs/_rpmb.lai /tmp/work/usr/ports/archivers/rpm4/work/stage/usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/rpm/_rpmb.la
libtool: warning: relinking '_rpms.la'
libtool: install: (cd /tmp/work/usr/ports/archivers/rpm4/work/rpm-4.13.0.2/python; /bin/sh "/tmp/work/usr/ports/archivers/rpm4/work/rpm-4.13.0.2/libtool"  --tag CC --mode=relink cc -O2 -pipe -fstack-protector -isystem /usr/local/include -fno-strict-aliasing -fPIC -DPIC -D_REENTRANT -Wall -Wpointer-arith -Wmissing-prototypes -Wstrict-prototypes -fno-strict-aliasing -fstack-protector -Wempty-body -module -avoid-version -shared -L/usr/local/lib -L/usr/local/lib/nss -L/usr/local/lib/db5 -L/usr/local/lib -fstack-protector -o _rpms.la -rpath /usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/rpm rpmsmodule.lo ../sign/librpmsign.la ../lib/librpm.la ../rpmio/librpmio.la -lpython2.7 -lpthread -lintl -L/usr/local/lib -inst-prefix-dir /tmp/work/usr/ports/archivers/rpm4/work/stage)
libtool: relink: cc -shared  -fPIC -DPIC  .libs/rpmsmodule.o   -Wl,-rpath -Wl,/usr/local/lib -L/usr/local/lib -L/usr/local/lib/nss -L/usr/local/lib/db5 ../sign/.libs/librpmsign.so /tmp/work/usr/ports/archivers/rpm4/work/rpm-4.13.0.2/lib/.libs/librpm.so ../lib/.libs/librpm.so /tmp/work/usr/ports/archivers/rpm4/work/rpm-4.13.0.2/rpmio/.libs/librpmio.so -ldb ../rpmio/.libs/librpmio.so -lnss3 -lbz2 -lz -lpopt -llzma -llua-5.1 -lm -lpython2.7 -lpthread -lintl  -O2 -fstack-protector -fstack-protector -fstack-protector   -Wl,-soname -Wl,_rpms.so -o .libs/_rpms.so
libtool: install: /usr/bin/install -c .libs/_rpms.soT /tmp/work/usr/ports/archivers/rpm4/work/stage/usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/rpm/_rpms.so
libtool: install: strip --strip-unneeded /tmp/work/usr/ports/archivers/rpm4/work/stage/usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/rpm/_rpms.so
